summary: Integration Reliability Layer (10-Part) - All 40 tests PASSED. Comprehensive backend testing covering: P1-Supplier API Resilience, P2-Supplier Sandbox, P3-Retry Strategy & DLQ, P4-Identity & Idempotency, P5-API Versioning, P6-Contract Validation, P7-Integration Metrics, P8-Supplier Incident Response, P9-Integration Dashboard, P10-Reliability Roadmap. All 35+ endpoints working correctly with proper authentication (super_admin role) and data persistence. All mock supplier adapters operational.
passed_tests: Auth Check: 3 reliability endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
P1: GET /api/reliability/resilience/config - returns config (org or default)
P1: PUT /api/reliability/resilience/config - updated mock_hotel timeout to 10000ms
P1: GET /api/reliability/resilience/stats - returns stats with window parameter
P2: GET /api/reliability/sandbox/config - returns enabled/mode/fault_injection
P2: PUT /api/reliability/sandbox/config - enabled sandbox with fault injection (30%)
P2: POST /api/reliability/sandbox/call - execute mock search, returns sandbox items
P2: GET /api/reliability/sandbox/log - returns sandbox call history
P3: GET /api/reliability/retry/config - returns supplier_call, payment, voucher_generation categories
P3: POST /api/reliability/dlq - enqueue failed operation, returns entry_id
P3: GET /api/reliability/dlq - list DLQ entries (pending/retrying/discarded)
P3: POST /api/reliability/dlq/{id}/retry - mark entry for retry
P3: DELETE /api/reliability/dlq/{id} - discard DLQ entry with reason
P3: GET /api/reliability/dlq/stats - DLQ statistics by category
P4: POST /api/reliability/idempotency/check - non-existent key returns duplicate:false
P4: GET /api/reliability/idempotency/stats - returns supported_operations, ttl_seconds
P5: GET /api/reliability/versions - returns 5 default suppliers (mock_hotel, mock_flight, mock_tour, mock_insurance, mock_transport)
P5: POST /api/reliability/versions - register new v2 for mock_hotel
P5: POST /api/reliability/versions/deprecate - deprecate v1 for mock_hotel
P5: GET /api/reliability/versions/history - version change log
P6: POST /api/reliability/contracts/validate (valid) - valid=true, schema_hash returned
P6: POST /api/reliability/contracts/validate (invalid) - valid=false, violations detected
P6: POST /api/reliability/contracts/validate - schema drift detection works
P6: GET /api/reliability/contracts/status - contracts list with validation_modes
P7: GET /api/reliability/metrics/suppliers - returns window, suppliers metrics
P7: GET /api/reliability/metrics/latency/mock_hotel - returns p50, p95, p99 percentiles
P7: GET /api/reliability/metrics/error-rate - returns error rate timeline
P7: GET /api/reliability/metrics/success-rate - returns success rate summary
P8: POST /api/reliability/incidents - create incident with auto_action=degrade_supplier
P8: GET /api/reliability/incidents - list incidents with pagination
P8: POST /api/reliability/incidents/{id}/acknowledge - acknowledge incident
P8: POST /api/reliability/incidents/{id}/resolve - resolve incident with resolution note
P8: POST /api/reliability/incidents/detect - auto-detect based on metrics (returns empty if no issues)
P8: GET /api/reliability/incidents/stats - by_status, by_severity, incident_types
P9: GET /api/reliability/dashboard - summary with open_incidents, dlq_pending, events_15m
P9: GET /api/reliability/dashboard/supplier/mock_hotel - supplier detail view
P10: GET /api/reliability/roadmap - 20 improvements, maturity_score with grade
P10: GET /api/reliability/maturity - dimensions (8), weights, overall_score, grade
critical_code_review_comments: Good: All 10 reliability layer parts fully implemented and working
Good: Resilience config with per-supplier overrides (timeout, retries, rate limit)
Good: Sandbox with fault injection (timeout, error_500, error_429, partial_response)
Good: DLQ with full lifecycle (enqueue, list, retry, discard, stats)
Good: Idempotency check with duplicate detection for booking operations
Good: API versioning with registration, deprecation, and history tracking
Good: Contract validation with schema_hash and drift detection
Good: Integration metrics with latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99)
Good: Incident response with auto-actions (disable_supplier, degrade_supplier, increase_timeout)
Good: Dashboard aggregates all reliability data in one view
Good: Roadmap provides 20 prioritized improvements with maturity scoring (8 dimensions)
Note: All supplier adapters are MOCKED (mock_hotel, mock_flight, mock_tour, mock_insurance, mock_transport)
seed_data_creation: Test data created: DLQ entries (supplier_call, TEST_discard_op), incidents (high_error_rate acknowledged/resolved), sandbox calls logged, contracts validated, version v2 registered for mock_hotel, v1 deprecated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integration Reliability Layer (10-Part) fully tested in iteration 69. All 40 API tests passed covering: P1-Resilience (config, stats), P2-Sandbox (config, call, log), P3-Retry/DLQ (config, enqueue, list, retry, discard, stats), P4-Idempotency (check, stats), P5-Versioning (registry, register, deprecate, history), P6-Contract (validate, status), P7-Metrics (suppliers, latency, error-rate, success-rate), P8-Incidents (create, list, acknowledge, resolve, detect, stats), P9-Dashboard (overview, supplier detail), P10-Roadmap (improvements, maturity). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_reliability_layer_iter69.py. Auth uses super_admin role (agent@acenta.test). All reliability endpoints at /api/reliability/*. Previous governance layer tests in iteration 68 (37/37 passed).

mocked_apis.notes: All supplier adapters are mock implementations. Sandbox fault injection works on mock responses. Real supplier integration is item #1 in reliability roadmap.
